deerflow-validator.description: Deerflow Agent Quality Validator — validates code against Deerflow standards. Enforces strict quality gates, dependency compatibility, security scanning, build verification, and contextual analysis across the entire agent framework.

tools.name: validate-code
tools.description: Runs comprehensive code validation against Deerflow coding standards including linting, type checking, complexity analysis, and anti-pattern detection.

tools.name: check-dependencies
tools.description: Validates dependency compatibility, checks for version conflicts, outdated packages, and ensures all required peer dependencies are satisfied.

tools.name: audit-security
tools.description: Performs security audit including npm audit, secret detection, known vulnerability scanning, and license compliance checks.

tools.name: verify-build
tools.description: Validates the build output including bundle size limits, required file existence, source map generation, and production readiness checks.

tools.name: analyze-context
tools.description: Performs contextual analysis of code changes including impact assessment, dependency graph analysis, and architectural compliance verification.

deerflow-validator.author: Deerflow Engineering
